title: Craftable Ingots
description: Lets you craft Ores into Ingots
body:
This mod lets you craft Ores into Ingots without smelting them.

Available Ingots to craft:

Both Ore varients can be used.

- Copper Ore
- Coal Ore
- Iron Ore
- Gold Ore
- Lapis Ore
- Redstone Ore
- Emerald Ore
- Diamond Ore
